dynamicAccess.description: The test restores the exact runtime metadata variables that it mutates.
requireString reads a fixed allow-list of validated configuration keys.
Doctor iterates the explicit local bootstrap requirements.
The local environment parser and container inspector copy only documented bootstrap and PostgreSQL keys.
Strict release readiness iterates the three explicit external evidence flags.

variables.name: ACCESSIBILITY_REUSE_E2E
variables.description: Reuses complete E2E accessibility evidence inside the canonical pipeline.

variables.name: API_PORT
variables.description: Fallback API port used by runtime and local orchestration.

variables.name: API_TEST_WITH_COVERAGE
variables.description: Enables API coverage during the full workspace test task.

variables.name: APP_ENVIRONMENT
variables.description: Legacy safety signal inspected only by demo-data protection.

variables.name: APP_PUBLIC_URL
variables.description: Public web origin used to build verification, recovery and portal links.

variables.name: APP_VERSION
variables.description: Application version exposed by runtime config and health endpoints.

variables.name: APP_WEB_URL
variables.description: Primary web origin used by organization invitations.

variables.name: AUTH_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
variables.description: Comma-separated origin allow-list for refresh and logout requests.

variables.name: AUTH_EMAIL_ENABLED
variables.description: Enables transactional authentication email delivery.

variables.name: AWS_CLOUDFRONT_DOMAIN
variables.description: Optional CloudFront domain used for public object delivery.

variables.name: AWS_DEFAULT_REGION
variables.description: Region passed to the local LocalStack container.

variables.name: AWS_REGION
variables.description: AWS region used by the S3 client.

variables.name: AWS_S3_BUCKET
variables.description: S3 bucket that stores application objects.

variables.name: AWS_S3_ENDPOINT
variables.description: Optional S3-compatible endpoint override.

variables.name: AWS_STAGING_VALIDATED
variables.description: External evidence flag confirming AWS staging validation.

variables.name: BUILD_TIME
variables.description: ISO timestamp embedded in runtime metadata.

variables.name: CHROME_BIN
variables.description: Optional Chrome or Chromium executable for Angular unit tests.

variables.name: CI
variables.description: Standard continuous-integration execution signal.

variables.name: COMMERCIAL_EMAIL_ENABLED
variables.description: Enables commercial email capabilities independently from auth email.

variables.name: COMMIT_RANGE
variables.description: Git range checked by conventional-commit verification.

variables.name: COMMIT_SHA
variables.description: Source revision exposed by runtime metadata.

variables.name: COOKIE_SECURE
variables.description: Requires HTTPS-only authentication cookies.

variables.name: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
variables.description: Comma-separated CORS origin allow-list.

variables.name: COVERAGE_REUSE
variables.description: Reuses coverage generated by the canonical workspace test task.

variables.name: DATABASE_SSL
variables.description: Enforces TLS for PostgreSQL and requires sslmode=require in production.

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.description: Prisma PostgreSQL connection URL.

variables.name: DB_SKIP_PRISMA_GENERATE
variables.description: Skips duplicate Prisma generation in the canonical pipeline.

variables.name: E2E_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: API origin used by Playwright journeys.

variables.name: E2E_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Maximum duration for E2E setup commands.

variables.name: E2E_FORCE_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Grace period before force-stopping E2E child processes.

variables.name: E2E_MAILPIT_BASE_URL
variables.description: Mailpit HTTP origin used by email E2E tests.

variables.name: E2E_REUSE_ARTIFACTS
variables.description: Reuses builds produced earlier by the quality graph.

variables.name: E2E_SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Graceful shutdown timeout for E2E services.

variables.name: E2E_STARTUP_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Health-check timeout while starting E2E services.

variables.name: E2E_WEB_BASE_URL
variables.description: Localized web origin used by Playwright journeys.

variables.name: E2E_WEB_REQUEST_LOGS
variables.description: Enables per-request diagnostics in the localized E2E server.

variables.name: EMAIL_VERIFICATION_EXPIRES_MINUTES
variables.description: Email-verification token lifetime in minutes.

variables.name: GH_TOKEN
variables.description: GitHub Actions token used to verify repository governance metadata.

variables.name: I18N_SKIP_BUILD
variables.description: Reuses localized builds during server verification.

variables.name: INFRA_INIT_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Secondary timeout for Terraform and TFLint initialization steps.

variables.name: INFRA_PLAN_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Secondary timeout for the credential-free Terraform staging plan.

variables.name: INFRA_SECURITY_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Secondary timeout for infrastructure security scanning.

variables.name: INFRA_STEP_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: Default secondary timeout for supervised infrastructure steps.

variables.name: JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_SECONDS
variables.description: Access-token lifetime in seconds.

variables.name: JWT_ACCESS_SECRET
variables.description: Cryptographic secret used to sign access tokens.

variables.name: JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_SECONDS
variables.description: Refresh-token lifetime in seconds.

variables.name: JWT_REFRESH_SECRET
variables.description: Independent cryptographic secret used for refresh tokens.

variables.name: KAKLEN_CONFIRM_DB_RESET
variables.description: Explicit confirmation phrase for destructive local database reset.

variables.name: LEAD_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL
variables.description: Internal recipient notified whenever the marketing site captures a new lead.

variables.name: LOG_LEVEL
variables.description: Structured API logging threshold.

variables.name: MAILPIT_SMTP_PORT
variables.description: Published SMTP port for local Mailpit.

variables.name: MAILPIT_WEB_PORT
variables.description: Published HTTP port for local Mailpit.

variables.name: MAIL_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: SMTP connection timeout in milliseconds.

variables.name: MAIL_FROM
variables.description: Sender identity for application email.

variables.name: MAIL_GREETING_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: SMTP greeting timeout in milliseconds.

variables.name: MAIL_HOST
variables.description: SMTP server hostname.

variables.name: MAIL_PASSWORD
variables.description: Optional SMTP password paired with MAIL_USER.

variables.name: MAIL_PORT
variables.description: SMTP server port.

variables.name: MAIL_REUSE_CONFIG_BUILD
variables.description: Reuses compiled configuration during SMTP verification.

variables.name: MAIL_SECURE
variables.description: Enables implicit TLS for SMTP.

variables.name: MAIL_SOCKET_TIMEOUT_MS
variables.description: SMTP socket timeout in milliseconds.

variables.name: MAIL_USER
variables.description: Optional SMTP username paired with MAIL_PASSWORD.

variables.name: MARKETING_PORT
variables.description: Port used by the marketing site's dev and start scripts.

variables.name: MARKETING_SITE_URL
variables.description: Public origin of the marketing site; used for outbound links in lead notifications.

variables.name: MIGRATION_REUSE_DEMO_VERIFICATION
variables.description: Delegates demo verification to its canonical pipeline task.

variables.name: MIGRATION_REUSE_PRISMA_CLIENT
variables.description: Reuses the Prisma Client during isolated migration replay.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Public API base URL embedded in the marketing build.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_INSTAGRAM_URL
variables.description: Public Instagram profile linked by the marketing site.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
variables.description: Canonical public origin embedded in marketing metadata and JSON-LD.

variables.name: NG_CLI_ANALYTICS
variables.description: Disables Angular CLI analytics in local commands.

variables.name: NODE_ENV
variables.description: Node runtime environment selector.

variables.name: ORGANIZATION_INVITATION_EXPIRES_SECONDS
variables.description: Organization invitation lifetime in seconds.

variables.name: PASSWORD_RESET_EXPIRES_MINUTES
variables.description: Password-reset token lifetime in minutes.

variables.name: PATH
variables.description: Container executable search path.
variables.justification: Defined by the API Docker image, not by application operators.

variables.name: PAYMENT_GATEWAY
variables.description: Configured payment gateway mode.

variables.name: PAYMENT_SANDBOX_SECRET
variables.description: Cryptographic secret for sandbox payment callbacks.

variables.name: PNPM_HOME
variables.description: pnpm installation path in the API build image.
variables.justification: Owned by the Docker build stage rather than deployment configuration.

variables.name: PORT
variables.description: Primary API listening port.

variables.name: POSTGRES_DB
variables.description: Database created by local and CI PostgreSQL containers.

variables.name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
variables.description: Known local PostgreSQL container password.

variables.name: POSTGRES_PORT
variables.description: Published local PostgreSQL port.

variables.name: POSTGRES_USER
variables.description: User created by local and CI PostgreSQL containers.

variables.name: PRODUCTION_PAYMENT_GATEWAY_VALIDATED
variables.description: External evidence flag confirming the production payment gateway.

variables.name: PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: API base URL written into public web runtime config.

variables.name: PUBLIC_APP_ENVIRONMENT
variables.description: Public environment label exposed by web and health metadata.

variables.name: QUALITY_RUN_ID
variables.description: Internally generated identifier used to isolate the lock, state, and container ownership of one local quality run.

variables.name: RATE_LIMIT_HASH_SECRET
variables.description: HMAC secret for distributed rate-limit identifiers.

variables.name: REAL_WHATSAPP_VALIDATED
variables.description: External evidence flag confirming real WhatsApp delivery.

variables.name: REDIS_PORT
variables.description: Published Redis port for local and CI services.

variables.name: REDIS_URL
variables.description: Redis connection URL for distributed limits and BullMQ; production requires rediss:// on a non-loopback managed endpoint.

variables.name: SERVICES
variables.description: LocalStack service allow-list.

variables.name: SESSION_IDLE_SECONDS
variables.description: Frontend idle-session timeout in seconds.

variables.name: SESSION_WARNING_SECONDS
variables.description: Frontend idle warning threshold in seconds.

variables.name: SWAGGER_ENABLED
variables.description: Enables Swagger outside production; production always disables it.

variables.name: TRUST_PROXY
variables.description: Enables trusted proxy handling for the deployed topology.

variables.name: WEB_DIST_ROOT
variables.description: Localized Angular build root served by web runtime tooling.

variables.name: WEB_PORT
variables.description: Localized frontend runtime port.

variables.name: WHATSAPP_HASH_SECRET
variables.description: HMAC secret for WhatsApp operational identifiers.

variables.name: WHATSAPP_MODE
variables.description: Selects manual or provider-backed WhatsApp delivery.
